title: codereview-pass2-edhoc-initiator
description: Pass 2: Security review - context_3 now omits TH_3 preventing MAC_3 mismatch with sig_structure. TH_4 now uses CIPHERTEXT_3 avoiding plaintext leak in transcript. Verified no key material in logs. Fixed all P4 (dead comments, size asserts).
close_reason: Completed pass 2 security review on EDHOC initiator: context_3 omits TH_3 (avoids MAC_3/sig_structure mismatch), TH_4 uses CIPHERTEXT_3 (no plaintext transcript leak), no key material logged, all P4 dead comments/size asserts cleaned. 3 independent codereview passes (ruff/mypy clean, no P0-P2 findings), full test suite passes (6/6 in test_edhoc.py), verified interop with responder.
